title: feat: sync Vast.ai deployment code with running servers
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Reality check
gist.blurb: We've synced our repository with the actual code running on our Vast.ai instances. Just doing some spring cleaning to make sure our blueprints match the building!
gist.summary: Synchronized the repository's deployment scripts and server code with the actual configurations running on Vast.ai instances for Sana, Z-Image, and LTX-2.
gist.impact: This ensures our infrastructure is reproducible and secure, with hardcoded tokens removed and deployment scripts fully up to date.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the monitor robot comparing a blueprint to a glowing server rack, representing syncing the codebase with running infrastructure.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot comparing a glowing digital blueprint to a humming server rack. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot comparing a glowing digital blueprint to a humming server rack.
